name: MAX78630
keywords: MAX78630, Maxim, Silergy, Energy, Electric, Polyphase, Three-Phase, Metering, Measurement, Active, Reactive, Apparent, Voltage, Current, Power Factor, Frequency, Temperature, Fundamental, Harmonic, Alarm, Min, Max, Energy Bucket, UART, SSI
description: Arduino library for the MAX78630+PPM three-phase energy metering processor. Measures RMS, instantaneous, fundamental, and harmonic voltage and current; active, reactive, and apparent power; power factor; energy accumulation; line frequency; and IC temperature for all three phases. Includes configurable alarm thresholds with hysteresis, min/max hardware recording, and SSI/UART communication.
